name: GoPro HERO 12 Action Camera
description: While the GoPro HERO12 Black features some similar hardware to its predecessor—a 27MP image sensor capable of 5.3K60 video recording—its improved battery life, HyperSmooth 6.0 technology, and expanded Bluetooth wireless further its capabilities.

features.Key Features:: 27MP with Improved Performance | 5.3K60/4K120/2.7K240 Video, 27MP Photos | HyperSmooth 6.0 Image Stabilization | Front and Rear LCD Screens | Bluetooth Audio Connectivity and Control | 33' Waterproof without Housing | 8x Slow-Motion Video | 1720mAh Capacity Rechargeable Battery
features.Standard Package: GoPro HERO12 Black | GoPro Enduro Rechargeable Li-Ion Battery for HERO12/11/10/9 Black | Curved Adhesive Mount | Mounting Buckle | Thumbscrew | USB-C Cable | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
features.Creator Edition: GoPro HERO12 Black | GoPro Enduro Rechargeable Li-Ion Battery for HERO11/10/9 Black | Curved Adhesive Mount | Mounting Buckle | Thumbscrew | USB-C Cable | GoPro Media Mod for HERO9/HERO10/HERO11 Black | GoPro Light Mod for HERO8 Black, HERO9 Black, HERO10 Black and HERO11 Black | Diffuser | 2-Finger Adapter | USB Type-C Cable | GoPro Volta Battery Grip for HERO & MAX | USB Pass-Though Door | USB-C Cable | Thumbscrew | Tripod Lanyard | Windscreen | Vertical Mounting Buckle | Carrying Case
